name: Spam Ala Gary
recipeIngredient: 1 can Spam, or Spam Lite, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the cream cheese until it reaches a blendable consistency. Add the sour cream and mix well.
2. Incorporate the minced Spam (or Spam Lite) and all the spices. Adjust seasoning to taste. Allow the mixture to refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
3. Serve on crackers, Doritos, or with Gary Phelps radiator cap.
